transcript.text:
Our country's native cattle
With tiger stripes
I'm curious
[Welcome~]
[Hello]
[I'm Tiger Cattle]
Around 30 servings, please
Really?
[This is going to be tough]
[Variety of different parts]
[Bling Bling]
[Steak tartare as well]
[30 Servings Served[
[The visuals]
[Thumbs up]
[Farewell, beef]

How're you eating all of that?
[Amazing]
[Where's that going to?]
I can raise a cow, but not Tzuyang
[One peaceful morning in Ulleung Island]
[Clear skies]
Hello everyone
I'm here to eat some beef
There's this thing called "Tiger Cattle" here
It's a must-eat food here in Ulleungdo
They're a different kind of breed
I've seen a lot of meat markets here
That must mean their beef is really good
I'm dying to try it
Oh, here!
Meat restaurant

[Ulleung-gun, Seomyun] [Sang Rok Meat Restaurant]
[Enjoy your meal]
-Hello sir -Hello
What kind of cow is a Tiger Cattle?
It's a stiped cattle
Our country's native cattle
Its juiciness is different
How does it look?
It has black tiger stripes
I'm very curious
Honey, go up there and show it to her
Tiger cattle
Can I?
Of course, let's go
You have to clean their poop
[Tiger cattle farm]

Hello~!
Are they over there? Wow, they're big
[First time seeing Tiger Cattles?]
[Hello]
[Look at that size!]
What makes them so special from other cows?
Our Hanwoo (Korean Cattles) are yellow
If the colors are half & half, they're "black cattles"
And the TIger Cattles have black stripes
We feed them one of Ulleung Island's specialties: Bujigaeni-namul
This is fermented
It's stored in here for about 2 years
[Let's open it up]
[They are fed this special plant]
You can eat a lot of Ulleungdo beef because they're that good
The menu

Beef, sirloin, ribs, steak tartare
I'll be eating those today
Excuse me
Can I make an order?
-Did you get to see the cattles? -Yes!
-Looking like this? -Yes, very cool
They're good looking
What part is the "beef" from?
Mostly assorted beef
And we only use Tiger Cattles
How many servings is the steak tartare?
It takes several people to eat it
So about 3 servings?
More We give a lot
It should be about 5 servings
Well then,

1order of steak tartare (5 servings), 10 servings of beef,
15 servings of sirloin, ribs
Really?
[Side dishes]
What is this?
Ulleungdo pumpkin
Pumpkin pancake? Looks good Thank you
Ulleung Island is also known for their pumpkins
That's tasty
[Ulleungdo Tiger Cattle]
[Check out its marblings]
[30 servings will take me so long]
[Steak tartare meat]
[High-quality meat]
[Add in the seasoning]
[Mix it up!]

[Steak tartare complete]
That looks amazing
Thank you
These are the assorted beef order
The rest are A-grade sirloin and ribs
And steak tartare
Thank you
You're eating all of that?
Yes
I was going to introduce you to my son, but
You'd eat every cattle on our farm in 1 week
[Might not even take a week]
Let's cook the beef first It's assorted beef
You can tell that they're all different parts
Amazing Let's eat the ones without fat first
Looks good

I want to hurry and eat
I keep thinking about the cows I met earlier
I'm sorry
Let's put the cooked meat here
There's no space
Looks delicious
Bon appetit
It's so juicy
The texture is different
It's very chewy
Just like when you eat pork jowl
Really chewy
That just now is so savory Amazing
A different kind of texture than "tender"
Very chewy
The meat juice though

[Let's keep grilling!] I feel like it'll be gone pretty quickly
Let's hurry
Garlic leek
Ulleung Island is known for its plants/herbs too
Let's get 2 pieces of meat on here
Wrap it
Lettuce
Should we try it with ssamjang? (spicy seasoning paste)
Scallion salad too
[Can't forget about steak tartare]
Let's try the tartare
That is so very jelly-like
Can't compare to the frozen steak tartare
The sauce is sweet and tasty
It's very jelly-like
[Really eating all of that?]

[Already finished with 1 plate]
It's all different parts of the meat, so the texture is all different
I'll eat a bunch at once
On the garlic leek
[Eating all of that at once?]
[And the rest as a lettuce wrap] With garlic
Scallion salad too
[Nom Nom]
[Now for the A-grade meat]
Its marbling is different
This plate is assorted parts too
There are different parts
They don't serve in big chunks like sirloins
Just a mix of different parts
This is square just like chuck flap tail
Dip in sesame oil with salt

[That's so good...]
Chuck flaps tend to get too gamey, but this isn't like that at all
It's a very clean and chewy version of the chuck flap tail
[What are you..? I love it]
Costs 10,000 Won more and it's worth it
This is delicious It's different for sure
Every part is delicious
I still think steak tartare is amazing
Its texture is incredible
The higher graded beefs are greasy and fatty
Contrarily, lower grades have tougher and drier meats
But this over here has excellent texture and clean flavor
-Can I get an autograph? -Of course!
Here you go
Excuse me, do you have some sort of stew here?
We had soybean stew

I'll take 1 of that, please
[What am I witnessing right now?]
1 piece of garlic on it
Amazing texture yet so clean
Thank you
Thank you
[Soybean stew visuals are perfect too]
You have to have some soybean stew with beef
30 servings!
How will she eat all of that?
[Seeing is not always believing]
[I must film this]
The meat is so juicy that my bowl is filled with meat juice
Are you forreal?
[No, are YOU forreal?]
[Change of grill]

[Start fresh]
It seems you can eat like 15 servings by yourself
It's 30 servings
Where's all of that going to?
All in my belly
I have a big belly and I can barely eat 2 servings
-Amazing -Thank you
I've cleared them so quickly Mainly because the meat is not gamey
[Some wasabi]
I have no strength in my fingers
Do you need 60 servings?
Thank you
Wow, yummy
Down to the last plate
I should've gotten wasabi earlier
Eat your beef with wasabi

[I'm back]
[Are you really eating all of that?]
[Yes, all cooked and ready]
Steak tartare is excellent
-Are you finished? -I still have a little bit left
-Your stomach feeling okay? -Yes, I'm fine
[Unbelievable]
She ate 30 servings
She's extraordinary!
She needs to enter a competition
[Finishing up]
[We heard the news]
1 last bite!
[30 servings of beef cleared!]
[I still can't believe it]
I can raise a cow, but not Tzuyang

That was such a nice meal
Thanks everyone!
[Extra scenes]
[Her fans waiting until she finished]
[Took photos together]
[Had a conversation]
[And took her autograph]
[Who is the owner on the phone with?]
[Reporting it to everyone]
[And it got written on the news!]
